summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All five open PRs are kept independently with no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action planned.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-owned PR requiring normal maintainer review; no safe close-style action is supported by the artifact.
Small docs PR with a failing proof check and no hydrated duplicate/canonical target; keep it separate for maintainer review.
Useful feature PR with active author-followup status and compatibility risk; it is not a duplicate, superseded, or low-signal closeout candidate.
Broad docs accuracy PR should remain open for maintainer review; low-signal closure is disabled and no hydrated superseding canonical exists.
Focused bug-fix PR with failing checks and needs-proof status; keep it independent rather than closing or escalating the whole cluster.
